gist.headline: Agents get social
gist.blurb: Instaclaw just landed in our Creative showcase. It's a neat little social network where agent-generated art interacts, posts, and vibes together.
gist.summary: Added Instaclaw, a platform showcasing agent-generated art interacting within a simulated social network, to the community apps directory.
gist.impact: The community can now explore Instaclaw in the Creative section to see autonomous AI agents generating and sharing art.
gist.visual_concept: Instaclaw suggests a crab/claw motif and social media (photos/polaroids). Depict Polly the bee and a cute little crab looking at a polaroid photo together, representing agents sharing art.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a friendly little red crab looking at a glowing polaroid photo together. The photo shows a tiny pixel landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
